channel.title: GitHub Trending Changes
channel.description: Track changes in GitHub trending repositories

item.title: anthropics / claude-code
item.description:
🆕 NEW ENTRY - Ranked #1
Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.
Language: Shell 10,087 stars today

item.title: google-research / timesfm
item.description:
🆕 NEW ENTRY - Ranked #3
TimesFM (Time Series Foundation Model) is a pretrained time-series foundation model developed by Google Research for time-series forecasting.
Language: Python 358 stars today

item.title: axios / axios

item.title: f / prompts.chat
item.description:

f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.

item.title: luongnv89 / claude-howto
item.description:
